title: Celcuity's Gedatolisib Misses Expectations at ASCO
headline: Celcuity's gedatolisib doubled PFS versus Novartis Piqray in PIK3CA-mutated breast cancer but disappointed investors despite strong efficacy at ASCO 2026.
key_facts: Phase 3 trial; doubled progression-free survival (PFS) versus Piqray (alpelisib); PIK3CA-mutated HR+/HER2- breast cancer

title: Abivax Shares Tank on Cancer Safety Signal
headline: Abivax's obefazimod showed landmark efficacy in ulcerative colitis but a cancer safety signal emerged, causing significant stock decline.
key_facts: Cancer safety signal; strong/landmark efficacy data; ulcerative colitis indication

title: Fulcrum Exploring Sale After Sickle Cell Setback
headline: Fulcrum Therapeutics is exploring a potential sale after FDA sidelined its sickle cell disease drug program.
key_facts: FDA sidelined sickle cell drug; company exploring sale; ending sickle cell ambitions

title: Gilead's Livdelzi Shows Phase 3 IDEAL Success
headline: Gilead reported positive Phase 3 IDEAL results for Livdelzi, supporting broader use in primary biliary cholangitis.
key_facts: Phase 3 IDEAL trial positive; Livdelzi already has initial approval; primary biliary cholangitis (PBC)

title: Merck Cuts 88 Jobs in New Jersey
headline: Merck laid off 88 employees in New Jersey as part of its $3 billion cost-cutting initiative announced in July 2025.
key_facts: 88 layoffs; $3 billion cost-cutting plan announced July 2025; New Jersey headquarters

title: Cingulate Gets Manufacturing CRL for CTx-1301
headline: Cingulate received a Complete Response Letter for ADHD drug CTx-1301 citing only manufacturing issues with no clinical safety or efficacy concerns.
key_facts: Complete Response Letter (CRL); manufacturing-related only; no safety or efficacy deficiencies; ADHD indication

title: Contraline Raises $92.5M for Male Contraception
headline: Contraline closed a $92.5 million Series B funding round to advance male birth control development.
key_facts: $92.5 million raised; Series B funding; male contraception focus

title: NewLimit Raises $435M at $3B+ Valuation
headline: Anti-aging startup NewLimit raised $435 million at a valuation exceeding $3 billion, targeting clinical entry in 2027.
key_facts: $435 million raised; $3 billion+ valuation; clinical entry targeted for 2027; anti-aging/longevity focus

title: Travere Acquires Everest Kidney Disease Pipeline
headline: Travere Therapeutics paid Everest Medicines $112 million upfront to acquire rare kidney disease pipeline assets.
key_facts: $112 million upfront payment; rare kidney disease focus; Everest Medicines (China-based)

title: Legend Biotech Shares In Vivo CAR-T Data
headline: Legend Biotech disclosed its first in vivo CAR-T therapy data, positioning it as a next-generation successor to Carvykti.
key_facts: First in vivo CAR-T data; Carvykti (cilta-cel) approved for multiple myeloma; in vivo CAR-T approach

title: Roche's Giredestrant Misses First-Line, NDA Accepted
headline: Roche's oral SERD giredestrant missed first-line metastatic breast cancer but had its NDA accepted with Priority Review for ER+ early breast cancer (PDUFA November 30, 2026).
key_facts: First-line metastatic trial miss; NDA accepted; Priority Review; PDUFA date November 30, 2026; ER+ early breast cancer

title: Lilly Threatens Hospitals Over 340B Claims Data
headline: Eli Lilly issued a deadline for hospitals to submit 340B drug discount claims data or lose pricing benefits.
key_facts: 340B claims data deadline; hospital pricing dispute; discount enforcement
